## Scope Check

- [ ] This PR is package/library work.
- [ ] This PR is sample/docs/CI work.
- [ ] If this is sample work, it does not include `packages/kafka/**`
      changes.

For sample-only PRs, run:

```bash
git diff --name-only main...HEAD -- packages/kafka
git diff --cached --name-only -- packages/kafka
```

Both commands should print nothing.
